name: Beignet Au Fromage
recipeInstructions:
Step 1. Grate the cheeses and put them into a small bowl with an electric mixer. Add the egg, milk, crushed garlic, sifted flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper. Beat on medium speed for 5 minutes.
Step 2. Remove the crusts from the bread. Spread about 2 tablespoons of the mixture onto each slice of bread, right up to the outer edges. Cut each slice into four squares. If the bread is fresh, remove the crusts after spreading the cheese mixture; this will help keep the bread firm.
Step 3. Place the beignets in hot oil with the cheese side down. Fry until golden brown on both sides for about 2 minutes, turning once. Drain on absorbent paper.
